Realtime log workbench

Batch tiny packets. Keep the pipeline hot.

JSONL logs in, category counts and timestamp trends out. Paste a stream, run it, and export the visual readout as PNG when you need to share it.

Rows5
Categories5
Series1
Clock Keytimestamp

Input stream

Paste newline-delimited JSON with a timestamp field and any numeric metrics.

Run state

Engine status and backend summary stay here. Supplemental trends are added below without replacing the main result.

idle

Clusters-
Entropy-
Trend-

Analysis output

The existing engine render stays intact. Export the rendered preview as PNG if you need a static artifact.
